sales_page_raw: AI Automation Agency: Make $200,000/month in passive income using AI tools. Launch your agency in 24 hours. Price increases tonight! No coding required. Learn the secret template to copy-paste. Only 5 spots left!

youtube_search.title: Exposing the AI Automation Agency scam
youtube_search.description: Reviews of people who spent $5000 on AI agency courses.

transcripts.agency_vid_1: This video shows that AI Automation Agency courses promise $200k/month but real buyers lose their savings. Standard template courses do not work in the real market.

web_search.title: FTC Operation AI Comply shuts down AI agency courses
web_search.snippet: FTC has shut down several high-profile AI agency courses promising passive income for deceiving consumers.
